metadata.title: Display Lesson List in Course Detail

story.iWant: to see all lessons of a course in an organized list
story.soThat: I can understand the complete course structure and each lesson's status

task.name: Create LessonListItem component
task.subtask: Create src/components/LessonListItem.tsx with TypeScript props interface
Implement row layout with drag handle, title, duration, status badge, timestamp, actions
Add status badge with semantic color mapping based on lesson status
Implement pulse animation for GENERATING states using Tailwind animate-pulse
Format timestamps with date-fns (relative < 7 days, absolute >= 7 days)

task.name: Create StatusBadge component
task.subtask: Create src/components/StatusBadge.tsx component
Implement color mapping for all lesson statuses (PENDING, SCRIPT_GENERATING, etc.)
Add icon + text pattern for accessibility (not color-only)
Add pulse animation variant for generating states

task.name: Create LessonList component with data fetching
task.subtask: Update CourseDetail/connect.ts to fetch lessons via $api.useQuery('get', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons')
Create src/components/LessonList.tsx to render list of LessonListItem components
Order lessons by lessonNumber field from API response
Implement loading skeleton for lesson list
Implement error state with retry functionality

task.name: Create LessonListEmpty component
task.subtask: Create empty state component with icon, title, description
Add "Add First Lesson" CTA button (placeholder - disabled for now)
Style with dashed border container per UX spec

task.name: Integrate LessonList into CourseDetail
task.subtask: Replace placeholder text in CourseDetail Lessons section
Render LessonList component with lessons from API
Handle empty/loading/error states appropriately

task.name: Add date-fns dependency
task.subtask: Install date-fns: bun add --exact date-fns
Create utility function for timestamp formatting in src/lib/utils.ts

task.name: Testing and validation
task.subtask: Test with course that has lessons (verify ordering, status colors)
Test with course that has no lessons (verify empty state)
Test loading state (verify skeletons appear)
Verify ARIA labels and keyboard accessibility
Run bun typecheck and bun lint:fix

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given I am on the course detail page with lessons, When the page loads, Then I see a table/list with all lessons ordered by lessonNumber field.

Given the lesson list is displayed, Then each row displays: Drag handle (⋮⋮) for reordering (placeholder for Story 3.5), Lesson title (primary text), Duration in minutes, Status badge with semantic colors, Last updated timestamp (relative format < 7 days, absolute >= 7 days), Actions menu (edit, delete icons).

Given lessons have different statuses, Then status badges use semantic colors: PENDING grey (#6b7280), SCRIPT_GENERATING/AUDIO_GENERATING blue (#7aa2f7) with pulse animation, SCRIPT_COMPLETED orange (#e0af68), COMPLETED green (#9ece6a), FAILED states red (#f7768e).

Given a course has no lessons, When I view the course detail, Then I see an empty state with: Icon (document with plus), Title "No lessons yet", Description "Create your first lesson to start building this course", CTA button "Add First Lesson" (primary cyan).
Given lessons are loading, Then I see skeleton placeholders matching the list layout.
Given an API error occurs while fetching lessons, Then I see an error state with retry button.

docs.doc: Container Pattern: connect.ts handles ALL business logic, data fetching, form handling. index.tsx is pure presentational.
Use $api.useQuery and $api.useMutation from @/lib/api. Types are auto-generated in @/types/api.d.ts.
Status badges use semantic colors: PENDING grey, GENERATING blue with pulse, COMPLETED green, FAILED red. Always include icon + text.
Relative timestamps for items < 7 days old ("2 hours ago"). Absolute timestamps for items >= 7 days ("Nov 28, 2025").
Empty states include centered icon (64px), title, description, and primary CTA button. Use dashed border container.
Complete story specification including acceptance criteria and technical notes for lesson list display.

file.reason: Main data fetching hook for course detail. Needs to add lessons query.
file.currentState: Fetches course data via $api.useQuery('get', '/api/courses/{slug}'). Needs extension to fetch lessons.

file.reason: Main course detail component. Contains Lessons section placeholder that needs to be replaced with LessonList.
file.currentState: Has placeholder text "Lesson management interface coming soon" in Lessons Card section.

file.reason: Type definitions for Lesson model from OpenAPI schema.
Auto-generated LessonData schema with all lesson fields including status.
file.schema: id: number, lessonNumber: number, title: string, corePractice: string, keyPoint: string, tone: string, durationMinutes: number, status: string, script: Record | null, audioUrl: string | null, scriptGeneratedAt: string | null, audioGeneratedAt: string | null, createdAt: string (ISO 8601), updatedAt: string (ISO 8601)

file.reason: shadcn/ui Badge component for status indicators. Use as base for StatusBadge.
shadcn/ui Skeleton component for loading states.
shadcn/ui Table component for lesson list structure.
Utility functions. Add formatTimestamp function here.
OpenAPI React Query client for data fetching.

package.name: date-fns
package.purpose: Timestamp formatting with formatDistance, format, differenceInDays

package.name: lucide-react
package.purpose: Icons: GripVertical, Pencil, Trash2, Plus, FileText, Clock, RefreshCw, Check, X, Circle, Loader2

package.name: tailwindcss
package.purpose: Styling including animate-pulse for generating states

constraints.constraint: Container Pattern: All data fetching must be in connect.ts, not in component files.
OpenAPI-First: Use $api.useQuery from @/lib/api, never manual fetch calls.
Type Safety: Import Lesson type from @/types/models, not directly from api.d.ts.
Tailwind: Use utility classes only, no CSS modules.
Status indicators must include icon + text, never color alone (accessibility).
Timestamps: Use relative format for <7 days, absolute for >=7 days.
New components go in src/components/ (not in containers).
Use bun add --exact for new dependencies.

interface.name: LessonData
useConnect
interface.signature: useConnect(courseSlug: string) → { course, lessons, lessonsQuery, form, isLoading, isError, ... }

tests.standards: Manual testing focus for MVP. Run bun typecheck and bun lint:fix before commit. Husky pre-commit hooks validate TypeScript and ESLint automatically.
tests.locations: No dedicated test directory yet. Testing is manual + TypeScript validation.

ideas.idea: Verify lessons are ordered by lessonNumber ascending after API response.
Test each column renders correctly: drag handle visible, title, duration with "min" suffix, status badge, relative/absolute timestamp, action icons.
Test status badge colors: create lessons with each status value and verify correct color/icon/animation.
Navigate to course with zero lessons, verify empty state appears with correct icon, title, description, and disabled CTA button.
Throttle network or add artificial delay, verify skeletons appear matching lesson row layout.
Simulate API error, verify error message and retry button appear. Click retry, verify refetch is triggered.

implementationNotes.note: The Lessons section in CourseDetail/index.tsx currently shows placeholder text. Replace the entire CardContent section with LessonList component.
Add lessons query to connect.ts using: $api.useQuery('get', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons', { params: { path: { slug: courseSlug } } })
Drag handle in LessonListItem should be visual placeholder only (Story 3.5 implements actual drag-and-drop).
"Add First Lesson" button in empty state should be disabled until Story 3.2 is implemented.
Consider using Table component from shadcn/ui for semantic HTML, but card-based layout also acceptable for mobile responsiveness.
